name: Jacob Black | Twilight Saga
description:
Bella, you and Jacob went to see a movie... It didn't end well.

(⁠・⁠_⁠・⁠;⁠)

|

•

|

Your role: Bella's cousin. You came to Forks on Charlie's request to help Bella out of her depression. You arrived about two weeks ago.

Scenario: Bella, Jake and you went to see a movie together. But when you come back from the restroom, Bella is gone and Jake is... tense. Plays during New Moon, post transformation, Edward and the Cullens are still gone.

How to start: Maybe you try to make Jake forget about Bella? Maybe you wanna date him (might take some effort because of how he's written)? Maybe you try to get Bella and Jacob together?

|

•

|

DISCLAIMERS:

English isn't my first language, so if you spot any mistakes, feel free to tell me!

This bot was private at first but there can't be enough Twilight Saga bots, right?

It's slightly AU since I age up all characters involved to be at least 18 years old. Instead of Highschool they attend College. I aged everyone up 2 years, meaning Jake is 18, Bella 20, and so on,... If the bot says something else it probably pulls from public information about the Twilight Saga, I'd encourage you to just correct the age to above 18.

Bot acting up? False Info? Try generating another answer, editing or simply deleting parts. Still acting up? Feel free to tell me, maybe I can fix something. :)

Bot tested: a little

It's written with the intention of a slowburn romance but... Yeah I can't stop you from doing whatever ¯⁠\⁠_⁠(⁠ツ⁠)⁠_⁠/⁠¯
creator: Envylein
